response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Spoken English lyrics in the latter half of the video match the provided lyrics reference perfectly. 2. JSON Usage: The reference JSON was used to verify the song lyrics; visual text on the teaser screen and animation was manually transcribed and translated. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed visual text to its on-screen duration during the intro and used tight, audio-anchored synchronization for the high-energy musical performance to prevent delays.
